---
name: Implementation task
about: A unit of work implementing an already-accepted RFC
title: "[RFC ####] <short description of the task>"
labels: implementation
assignees: ''
---

<!--
Use this template only for work that implements an ACCEPTED RFC.

- For bugs, use a bug report / plain Issue.
- For new design ideas, open a discussion or draft an RFC first
  (see docs/rfcs/README.md).
-->

## RFC

<!-- The accepted RFC this task implements. Required. -->

Implements RFC **####** — `docs/rfcs/NNNN-....md`

## Task

<!-- The specific slice of the RFC this issue covers. An RFC is usually
     broken into several implementation issues; describe just this one. -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Copy the relevant items from the RFC's "Acceptance criteria" section
     that this task is responsible for, so "done" is unambiguous. -->

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Affected areas

<!-- Files, modules, or components expected to change
     (e.g. src/racoon/, libipsec, racoon.conf handling, build system). -->

## Testing notes

<!-- How the change will be verified: unit/integration tests, interop
     testing against specific peers, manual steps. -->

## Notes

<!-- Anything else: dependencies on other tasks, open questions deferred
     from the RFC, etc. -->
